reviews.review_description:
My review scale*
5- Amazing game, while still might not be perfect any flaws are forgivable, is well worth your time
4- Good game, might have a few minor issues or missed opportunities keeping it from being better, but is very playable and still an enjoyable experience
3- Mid tier game, not great but not awful, these games can go either way depending on who you are or what you want or expect out of the game
2- Not a very good game, but not completely broken or unplayable, you might really need to want to play this game to get any enjoyment out of it
1- Awful game, broken or unplayable, I don't see these games being for anyone unless significant updates fix the game

*This is an overly simplified review scale since meta does not allow for half stars so in some cases I may round a game up or down depending on a case by case scenario, 
my reviews are always honest and in no way swayed by anybody else and regardless if I received a game for free or not, these ratings and reviews are however part of a 
campaign for us as consumers to be better about reviewing games and helping bring the games we love the attention they deserve.

I've had this game for a couple years now... and I still play it. I use joysticks to fly (not arms). It's super fun and absolutely dead-on accurate. There's only ONE problem: Why not design more courses for us super fans? I would HAPPILY pay for DLCs and I'm sure there are others that would too. It seems like a no-brainer! Better yet, give us a second game! Ah! I love this game. Wish there were more like it. Great job, Devs.

Love this game. Had hours and hours playing it many more to go!
You can invite ya mates and catch up pretty cool.
Yes was standing up for first jump ever and I nearly fell over! That’s what I paid for !!!
Get familiar with the controls before leaving a negative review. Once you master the controls, you're just flyin! Plus the scenery are so nice! Good job devs.
My uncle bought this for me for me and him to play, best decision ever! I love skydiving, watching the beautiful scenery, great game! 10/10

People that are giving this a lower review because you have an easily queasy stomach should rate the game based on its quality instead of your personal issues. It’s a realistic VR falling, gliding, extreme heights, extreme speeds, and face-plants into sides of cliff experience!  Do you buy scary games and give them one star because they’re scary??  

Developers and consumers depend on accurate reviews, so please don’t ruin game ratings because a high speed height game is realistic enough to make your stomach drop. That’s the point of them game and the developers do an INCREDIBLE job. I’ve had this game since the 1st quest and come back to play it more than any other game. Absolutely polished and a thrill to play!

Anyway, LOVE the game and the stomach dropping thrill of the realism.  Excellent work!
Give yourself a chance to get used to the control styles. Once I mastered the one that worked the best for me, the game was pure FUN! 🔥
Could really use an update for Quest 3. It was fun when it came out and I still play from time to time, but visually pales in comparison to what the Quest 3 is capable of in other games.

Reallyreally love this game. its my Fav vr game ever---wereally need a Rush 2 Plsssss😁😄😄😃😃 . in my and others opinion, this is the best flying/ skydiving game on the quest. we really need a RUSH 2. now 18th of March 2025 and still loving this game....this is the best skydiving/ flying game onthe Quest.... Hope we get a second game Pls.....And can we have the Rush 2 on a Dawn of Jets background,,,,,,,,PLS
The game is old but still the best flying experience in vr! The PC version looks much better. Waiting for graphics update for Quest 3.

reviews.review_title: Something I've waited for all my life
reviews.review_description:
This is a cool game. I've always dreamed of being able to fly. This game makes it a virtual reality. Two wings way up!

UPDATE: Does The Binary Mill have maps of where tokens are located? I can't find one particular gold token but I cant find it!
don't waste you're $15 on this piece of sh*t gorilla tag is 1000x more fun and its free

I love, love, love this game!!! I'm an adrenaline junkie but have gotten no thrill from the other extreme sport games. This game is so fun though! They must've updated some parts of the game because some complaints and recommendations in earlier reviews aren't an issue now. This is the only game I want to play!

It’s untenable to continue to require every account to have a game for multiple users to play. I totally understand games are expensive but I shouldn’t have to buy separate copies so both of my kiddos can play at once. Please make the update.

The game is fun. I just wish there were a few small changes that would make this game amazing. I wish you had the option to actually jump/step off the plank instead of staring at a dot to begin. The death is just a black screen which is underwhelming to the emotional experience. It didn’t feel like free falling (hands down) is making you faster than gliding (as I imagine this is how it would go in a real experience). It is hard to understand how to beat the other guys, which I do occasionally, but I’m not sure why.
This game is a waste of money and apparently there's no way to get a refund.
1 of the best Vr games
It's alright.... Nothing great... Kinda bored and dizzy from it

developer_response.body:
Hi qhdevon43, If it helps there are a lot of different options to assist with comfort settings (and other ways to steer) that could help. Also if our support team can give you a hand at all please feel free to reach out :)

Support - https://bit.ly/34gopZR

reviews.review_description:
Just buy this game. 

I am not great with heights, and several games I've tried on my Quest, I had to refund due to this. I assumed RUSH would be the same, and taking into consideration the refund policy, I had nothing to lose by trying. Let me give you a pro-tip straight out the gate: Do not stand! Do not sit! Lie down. Emulate the activity. I initially set the controls to hand, but found it awkward, I will come back to this. When you begin select ' Head Aim ' control. Lie on your bed with your head slightly over the end and board that helicopter. Due to my afore mentioned issue with heights, I thought I would be wrenching my headset off shortly after the initial starting jump....but NO. What I was met with, without sounding too cliche was a 'RUSH'. This game just feels incredible, the freedom mixed with exhilaration and yet control is the best V.R experience I have had yet. If you've been put off by comments of motion sickness, don't be. I also get this very easily, and mostly in games you wouldn't associate with it. This has given me none. Playing this game made me feel like I conquered something, and every time I jump it feels just as good. The semi arcadey feel of the presentation and graphics is excellent, and feels like it should of come from the hands of SEGA. My 68 year old mother has just played this, and likewise fallen in love with it. When I finish work today, we will be doing a mountain jump together. That is the magic of V.R , and the brilliance of RUSH. 

Go and take to the skies, this is an essential purchase.

If you want VR to make your feet tingle and stomach plummet with the sudden discombobulation of being somewhere completely different to your living room, or bedroom, then this experience will not let you down.

From standing atop a mountain ready to dive into the valley below, to flying through narrow ravines and skimming evergreen trees, or a snowy piste to gain speed it’s a truly immersive experience. At first I wondered if the GFX were a bit too basic, but the experience of flying is so real that GFX are forgotten (though when this improves it will make it that much more of a thrill).

Multiplayer with friends is great fun, though getting into the game together can be pretty difficult and frustrating unless you both know exactly how to do it (after a few goes and several failed attempts we’re still working it out). A ‘training vid for this would be of more use than the training vids for flying, which is already very intuitive).

This game is why you get a VR headset - so don’t miss out!

I've ALWAYS wanted to skydive in a wingsuit. This one is so immersive and on the most intense setting it gets the blood pumping! As one user mentioned earlier...do your self a favor and get a high speed fan and stand facing it. WOW!
Also. Please be careful in your play area as i nearly fell face first in real life trying to land!
Im currently looking for more intense games like this one provides as im a adrenaline junky!
Somewhat repetitive, but overall really fun and liberating! I just put on my own music and lower the sound and just fly around and chill.

I was hesitant to purchase this game being new to VR and all the talk about getting sick. I was pleasantly surprised that no motion sickness was had. Only downside is the graphics. I think if the graphics while flying down the mountains we’re better, the price for this game would be reasonable.
If your looking for a nauseating cartoony flying experience look no further. I thought it would capture some high scenic flights but nah! I wish I could get a refund. Avoid!
Terrible
I tried this as my first VR game and it blew me away. Amazing sense of speed as the scenery races past

reviews.review_title: multiple users in the same household?
reviews.review_description: It’s a fun game for the wife and I… I would like to have the ability to load separate players without having to purchase additional games.  You can’t customize for individual experiences when you have to share the same player.

Being new to VR I thought that the intensity level would be too much.  However, after the initial vertigo feeling before the first  jump  you become so immersed in the game that it quickly disappears.  The game has surpassed my expectations and has become my current go to whenever I get time to play.
Love it but wish it looked more realistic needs a lot better graphics and more realistic

I love everything about this game.  I have one problem. Sometimes my character gets in the way of my viewing. And makes the game very difficult to play because I can’t see where I am going.  How do I fix that?? Or can’t I?
Not thrilled, opened for 15 minutes and was denied a refund. Make sure you want it!
I love the game it is difficult but very challenging and fun. I would recommend this game it can be intense but is my favorite game so far
What a rush! Love this game. Tip: get a high powered fan blowing in front of you for really imersive experience.
pretty cool

First game to actually make my brain think I’m flying, when I’m not. I don’t play this game as much as my other ones but if I ever want that “thrill” or want to race, this is my go to game!

Graphics are amazing, and the controls are very diverse. Arms tired? Change to your head controls or controllers! This game even works sitting down, allowing for those with any disabilities or fatigue to still enjoy this thrilling game.

developer_response.body: Can never have too many options CWsx  ;P thanks for the review!!

reviews.review_description:
This is intens. I play while laying on the ground. If not I fall because my body thinks I am really flying. Love it! 

After four jumps I am to sick to carry on. 

But its worth it! The adrenaline rush is amazing. I can almost feel the g force. 

 I also can imagine flying a wingsuit in real life is hard for your stomach. 😅

Recomended for people who really wanna feel something unique in VR.

developer_response.body: Love it! way to push it to the extremes dennisdenniss, all that's missing now is a fan to be blowing on you as you take the plunge xD . As a side note be sure to check out some of the comfort settings in the options menu to help calm the stomach a little so you can squeeze out some more jumps :) .. Keep up the FUN !

reviews.review_title: Fun game but hard to control
reviews.review_description: It's a fun and all but when I try going down it's kind of hard but a good game overall.
Very fun! One of the best games on oculus so far!

developer_response.body: It makes us really happy to hear feedback like that BumblebeeRayRay from the team and I, we really appreciate it :)

reviews.review_description: I am remodeling my game room so I needed a game to play in the meanwhile in limited game area or sitting. I also wanted something other than a shooter since I have a few shooters...something different.  This is what VR is about. Immersion...adrenaline... I love it.

I was so excited to try this game that I went ahead and bought it. The graphics are cool, the feel is legit, the nausea is thorough. If you don’t get vertigo or nauseous easily, this game is great. For those that do, steer clear! Only wish there were more demos for games.

developer_response.body: Hi brainkiss - thanks for the feedback! Have you tried playing with the comfort slider in the game's settings? Try increasing that to max and working your way back if you're finding the default setting a bit too intense. Alternatively, we have several different control methods to play the game - perhaps try using 'look to steer' as a starting point also. Let us know how you go! :)
